Hero.title: Geodata Engineering &
Hero.description: I design and ship production data systems and AI automations, spatial pipelines, ML models and internal tools built on geospatial analytics. The sectors vary; the problem tends not to: too many steps between raw data and a decision.

About.expertiseSubtitle: Four competencies built around production geospatial systems, each one informed by the constraint that a calibrated pipeline tends to outlast a clever one.
About.educationSubtitle: Strong foundation in AI, data science, and business analytics from top European institutions.
About.experienceSubtitle: 4+ years building production geospatial systems and ML pipelines across European markets and academic research.
About.lede1: Based in Amsterdam, I build production spatial systems for real estate funds, climate-risk teams and alternative-data pipelines. The work ranges from PostGIS schemas and hedonic models to DeckGL maps that turn parcel-level data into a decision. Four-plus years on the production side, and the constraint tends not to change: a calibrated pipeline tends to outlast a clever one.
About.lede2: My bias: opinionated internal tools beat big platforms; a tested pipeline beats a clever one; and a map should answer a question, not perform complexity.
About.factBasisValue: Amsterdam, Netherlands · Dutch, English, German, Italian

expertise.title: Machine Learning & AI
expertise.description: Production ML and AI: predictive models for valuation, rent and flood risk (90%+ accuracy), plus LLM pipelines and tool-using agents that automate research, classification and reporting.

expertise.title: Data Engineering
expertise.description: Robust data pipelines for European REITs, funds and institutional investors. Inputs span geodata, alternative and unstructured sources, running on a distributed Airflow and Docker stack.

expertise.title: Geospatial Analysis
expertise.description: Advanced spatial analytics: agent-based gentrification modelling, street-level computer vision, and spatially-aware data science at parcel and postcode resolution. Although the inputs change, the spatial join tends to be where the logic lives.

expertise.title: AI Automation
expertise.description: LLM-powered workflows and internal tools that remove manual steps from data operations. RAG pipelines, structured-output agents, React interfaces and the PostgreSQL schemas that hold them together.

experience.description: Leading data strategy and AI initiatives for alternative data FinTech serving European real estate funds, assets, and REITs. Working on the rollout of a project aggregating, homogenising and visualising intracity data from world cities.

Delivered data-driven insights for real estate investment decisions. Built ML models for property valuation and market analysis across 15+ European markets, working on projects for leading real estate companies, pension funds and for Eurostat.

Thesis on predicting flooding occurrences in Europe using alternative data and ML models, achieving 90%+ accuracy in risk classification and working on smaller items, preparing, aggregating and visualising data.
Part-Time Full Stack Developer maintaining enterprise-grade digital declaration software, working with web technologies such as EmberJS, PHP and sensitive customer data, using CI/CD and testing.

education.description: Thesis: Building an Agent-Based Model to Explain Gentrification in European Cities (Grade: 8/8)
Focus on machine learning, NLP, and computational methods for data analysis.

Contact.bio: Based in Amsterdam. I design and ship production spatial systems, PostGIS pipelines, hedonic models, geospatial visualisations. Although the sectors vary (real estate, climate risk, alternative data), the constraint tends not to: too many steps between raw data and a decision.

Projects.kicker: Selected work: research, theses, side projects
Projects.subtitle: Things I've built or studied, at university, in research, and in my own time. Not a portfolio of client deliverables; a portfolio of thinking.

items.title: Gentrification agent-based model
items.outcome: Ten-year simulation of neighbourhood turnover in European cities, calibrated on Kadaster and CBS microdata.

items.title: Parcel-level flood-risk classifier
items.outcome: Supervised classification on LiDAR and rainfall-radar features at parcel level, written up as the bachelor's thesis.

items.title: Hedonic rent model · 15 EU metros
items.outcome: Parcel-level hedonic rent benchmarks built on PostGIS and gradient boosting across European metros.

items.title: LanguageBuddy
items.outcome: A small conversational language-practice app: LLM-driven correction, spaced repetition, and a habit-friendly UI.

items.title: Façade & commerce signals from street-view
items.outcome: CNN extraction of façade and commerce features from ~4M street-view frames across six EU cities.

Thoughts.subtitle: Short pieces on tools, pipelines, spatial methods and the occasional rant.
Thoughts.endCtaBody: Browse other essays on geodata, AI/ML and operations, or read more about who's behind the writing.

AboutTeaser.bio1: Head of Data at KR&A in Amsterdam, leading AI and geospatial initiatives across European real estate, climate risk and alternative-data pipelines. MSc in Data Science & Business Analytics from Bocconi; BSc in Artificial Intelligence from the University of Amsterdam, roughly four years between the two, spent mostly on the production side.
AboutTeaser.bio2: I work at the intersection of geospatial analytics, ML and the data infrastructure that makes both useful, the pipelines, schemas and spatial joins that do not appear in papers but determine whether the model ships. This site collects what is worth writing down: papers, methods, tools and the occasional strong opinion on why dashboards are overrated.

Sectors.subtitle: Domains where I have spent time, academically, professionally or both. Each has its own data quirks and its own definition of what constitutes a shipped result.

items.name: Geospatial Analytics
items.blurb: Spatial pipelines, H3 indexing, parcel-level models, alt-data ingestion.

items.name: Insurance & Climate Risk
items.blurb: Exposure modelling, flood and CV pipelines, claims triage automations.

items.name: Logistics & Mobility
items.blurb: Routing, depot siting, last-mile, ops dashboards that replace ten manual reports.

items.name: Public Sector & Planning
items.blurb: Mobility, climate adaptation, infrastructure resilience and parcel-level analysis.

items.name: Real Estate & Investment
items.blurb: Valuation, gentrification ABMs, alt-data for REITs, funds and asset managers.

Proof.quote: Ian shipped the thing he said he'd ship, in the time he said he'd ship it.
